name: gantt
description: Gantt chart — task bars across a date axis.
purpose: Use for project plans with overlapping or staggered tasks. Each task is a bar on the time axis; bars can span multiple periods.

tasks.description: One li per task. Format: `Task name — start, end[, status]`.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: gantt -->

## H1 2026 plan.

- Discovery — Jan, Feb
- Design — Feb, Mar
- Build — Mar, May
- Launch — May, Jun
